creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Does having the base device configured with 'inet' not apply?  I would think that would apply, and if not could potentially be a software bug.

hostname="hosta.example.org"
ifconfig_em0="inet 192.168.1.3 netmask 255.255.255.0"
ifconfig_em0_alias0="vhid 1 pass testpass alias 192.168.1.50/32"
